headline: Industrial Building Safety Audit Finds 2,400 Violations
context: DOSH found 2,400 serious safety violations across 850 industrial buildings inspected in 2025 nationwide audit.

cards.big: 2,400 safety violations found in 850 industrial buildings during 2025 audit
cards.sub: Average of 2.8 serious violations per building including structural and fire

cards.big: 38% of factories lacked current Certificate of Fitness for buildings
cards.sub: Expired certificates mean structural integrity not verified for years

cards.big: DOSH has only 480 inspectors for 58,000 registered industrial premises
cards.sub: Each inspector responsible for 121 premises making annual inspection impossible

cards.big: 3 factory collapses in 2025 killed 18 workers in Selangor and Johor
cards.sub: All 3 buildings had outstanding violation notices never enforced by authorities

cards.big: Industrial safety tests whether inspection systems can scale to match the built environment
2,400 industrial building violations found. Safety audits only matter if enforcement follows the findings.
